signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.welcome: Sign up to manage your finances

forgotPassword.title: Recover Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a recovery link
forgotPassword.subject: [MoneySaver] Password Recovery
forgotPassword.body:
Hi! 

We noticed you forgot your password.

Use the following code to reset it: {{otp}}

This code will expire in 10 minutes.

You received this email because a password reset was requested for your account.

auth.title: User Authentication
auth.forgotDescription: To recover your password, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.signUpDescription: To complete your registration, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.loginDescription: To complete your login, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.length: The code must be 6 digits long

resetPassword.title: Change Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new password. You will be redirected to the login page.

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.passwordChars: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
